metro.schedule: Trains depart Penn Station every 15 min. Next departures: 17:32, 17:47, 18:02, 18:17. Direct to Meadowlands Station — no transfers.
metro.platform: Platform 1, Penn Station NJ Transit lower level
metro.fare: Standard NJ Transit fare applies. Tap-to-pay accepted.

buses.direction: From Port Authority Bus Terminal, NYC
buses.schedule: Buses depart Port Authority every 10 min from 15:00–19:30. Next: 17:25, 17:35, 17:45, 17:55. Return buses run until 2 hours post-match.
buses.fare: Standard NJ Transit fare. Cash and MetroCard accepted.

rideshare.dropoff: Rideshare Drop-off Zone, East Plaza (Lot B entrance). Follow green signage from Rt-3.
rideshare.pickup_post_match: East Plaza designated rideshare pickup zone. Expect 30–45 min wait after final whistle.

parking.notes: Pre-purchased passes only. No walk-up. Card payment only.
Walk-up available. Card payment only. Accessible spots near east entrance.

general.text: MetLife Stadium is accessible by NJ Transit rail (Meadowlands Station, 8-min walk to Gate A) and NJ Transit Bus 353 (direct from Port Authority, stops 3 min from Gate A). Rideshare pickup/dropoff at East Plaza. Parking available in Lots A, B, and C — pre-purchased passes recommended.
